_README_FOR_GENERATOR.purpose: Generate a luxury cosmic passport visual artifact. Render only visual structure, geometry, lighting, materials. ALL TEXT must be drawn as latin or short cyrillic placeholder ONLY 1-3 letters per slot. Long phrases will be added later in vector editor. Treat ALL long text fields as 'text overlay zones' — leave clean rectangular areas with correct background but without rendering the full text content.
anti_hallucination_rules: DO NOT render long Cyrillic phrases as image pixels
DO NOT invent words or symbols not listed in this JSON
DO NOT add extra logos, brand marks, or framework names beyond the seven listed
DO NOT generate text longer than 3 characters in any text element
Where long text is required, render a clean dark panel with subtle texture as a placeholder — typography is added externally

core_descriptors: scientific blueprint precision with ritual reverence
negative_prompt: no random esoteric clutter (no tarot cards, no coins, no zodiac wheels unless specified)
no anime, no cartoon, no kitsch fantasy
no bright pure red, no acid green
no fake text, no garbled letters, no OCR-noise pseudowords

rules: soft_gold and warm_amber used only for sacred geometry edges and metagrams
ice_cyan reserved for energy threads and resonance lines
no gradient soup — every color zone has clean boundaries

central_axis.subject: luminous diamond crystal sphere suspended on a base of crystal shards
details: internal nervous-system-like golden filaments radiating from a single luminous core
fractal lightning branches reaching upward like a tree of consciousness
ascending silver-gold particles around the sphere
fluid translucent water-like ribbons spiraling at the base
central_axis.symbolism: the crystallized identity — silence as supreme syntax

frameworks_strip.rendering_rule: each item is a horizontal pill — left side glyph in soft_gold inside a glass disk, right side dark text overlay zone (placeholder, no rendered text)

resonance_coordinates.rendering_rule: four glowing orbs connected by a flowing river of light — each orb has a tiny tag panel below, but the @-handles themselves are NOT rendered as text in the image; they are placed in vector overlay later

header_bar.moon_phase_icons: small monochrome circles representing waxing-to-waning lunar cycle

placement_rules: metagrams appear as small constellations between blocks
each metagram glows soft_gold with subtle particle halo
no metagram larger than 3% of canvas height

background_geometry.deep_layer: barely-visible Flower of Life pattern at 4% opacity
background_geometry.mid_layer: thin grid of golden meridian lines connecting major blocks
background_geometry.front_layer: faint constellation map dust in deep_indigo

typography_overlay_specification._critical: These fields are NEVER rendered by the image generator. They are exported as a separate layer for vector editor (Figma/Affinity/InDesign) overlay.
typography_overlay_specification.primary_font_recommendation: IBM Plex Serif (cyrillic) + IBM Plex Mono (codes)
rules: all latin in lowercase except ID strings
all cyrillic in lowercase quiet style — no CAPS shouting
tracking always loose for that 'quiet luxury' feel
every block has 24px internal padding minimum

content_data_for_overlay._note: This is the source-of-truth text content. It is NOT rendered by the image generator. It is applied externally by vector editor on top of the placeholder zones defined above.

pass_1_base.description: Generate the dark cosmic background with central crystalline diamond sphere, sacred geometry, and all empty placeholder panels.
pass_1_base.prompt_seed: ultra-detailed cinematic cosmic passport poster, central luminous diamond crystal sphere on crystalline base, golden nervous-system filaments radiating from inner core, void black background with deep indigo undertones, sacred geometry meridian grid in soft gold at 12% opacity, swiss design layout with three columns, dark hexagonal and rectangular panels with thin gold borders awaiting text, no rendered text, ultra-luxury minimal aesthetic, 8k, photorealistic crystal, ethereal lighting

pass_2_geometry.description: Add metagram constellations and energy threads.
pass_2_geometry.prompt_seed: subtle metagram constellation layer (triangle, three dots, kanji-like glyphs, infinity, hourglass, recurrence, exchange, target circle) floating between panels in soft gold, thin ice-cyan energy threads spiraling from the central sphere outward, glowing particle dust

pass_3_overlay.description: External vector pass in Figma — apply all typography from content_data_for_overlay onto the placeholder zones. Do NOT do this in image model.
